text:
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Jeeves pipeline alert indicating permanent failure of Daily Pipeline with rate limit issue.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Daily correspondence summary highlighting pressing GitHub workflow failures in jeeves-unchained and jeeves-memory repositories.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that the Jeeves Research Phase workflow failed in jeeves-memory.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification of failed CI workflow in jeeves-unchained repository.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification of failed CI workflow in jeeves-unchained repository.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification of failed CI workflow in jeeves-unchained repository.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that the Jeeves Daily Pipeline workflow run failed.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that the Jeeves Correspondence Phase workflow run failed.
- [reply needed] Alan Beasley: Alan Beasley shared a version of Sam Keen's essay with paragraph numbers for the Loder Group.
- [reply needed] lang.mc@gmail.com: Daily correspondence briefing mentioning a decision required from Carnival Cruise Line.
- [no action] "Superhuman – Zain Kahn": Promotional email from Superhuman about Tavus AI image-to-avatar feature.
